Class RiskFreeRateMapping

java.lang.Object
grafiosch.entities.BaseID<Integer>
grafiosch.entities.ProposeTransientTransfer
grafiosch.entities.Auditable
grafioschtrader.entities.RiskFreeRateMapping
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
@Entity public class RiskFreeRateMapping extends Auditable
Maps an ISO currency code to the synthetic Security (NON_INVESTABLE_INDICES) whose historical quotes serve as that currency's risk-free interest rate. Used by RiskFreeRateService to resolve the rate-of-record for risk metrics such as the Sharpe ratio.

The Integer surrogate PK is required by the project's CRUD infrastructure (Auditable / BaseID<Integer>); the functional uniqueness key is currency, enforced by a UNIQUE index in the schema.
